hero.title: Kumbira chirongwa chekuwanika
hero.lead: IATF inoongorora zvikumbiro zvemapurojekiti ekuwanika anotangira pane chinodiwa chaicho.
support: Haudi tsanangudzo yakazara. Chinetso chakajeka, icho chinobata ani, uye chikonzero nei chichikosha chakakwana kutanga.

intro: Nzira dzose dzinopinda mukunzvera kumwe chete.

items.label: Nzvimbo yepaIndaneti
items.body: Shandisa fomu riri pasi apa kuti utumire chikumbiro chakarongwa.

items.label: Kero yepaIndaneti
items.body: Tumira chikumbiro chacho zvakananga kuna {{contact.requestsEmail}}Zvikumbiro zveemail zvinogona kuva zvinyorwa zvechikumbiro zveveruzhinji mushure mekudzokororwa nekugadziriswa.

items.label: Kusawirirana
items.body: Tanga ipapo kana izvozvo zviri nyore. Chikumbiro chichiri kupinda mukunzvera kumwe chete.

guidance.title: Usati watumira chikumbiro
paragraphs: IATF inoshanda pachena. Zvikumbiro zvinogona kupfupikiswa uye kuburitswa sezvinyorwa zveveruzhinji zvikumbiro musangano reIATF GitHub, pane ino webhusaiti, kana zvese zviri zviviri.

Usapinza kero dzevanhu, nhamba dzerunhare, mashoko ezvokurapa, kana kuti mashoko anozivisa nezvemunhu mumwe nomumwe anoshandisa zvinhu zvinobatsira pakurapa kunze kwokunge zvakakodzera uye kana uchibvumirana kuti IATF iongorore mashoko acho.
IATF inobvisa zvisingakoshi zvemunhu ruzivo rwekuonana isati yaburitsa zvinyorwa zvekukumbira.

review.title: Kuongorora zvinotarisirwa
paragraphs: IATF inoongorora zvikumbiro zvebasa rakakodzera, zvinokwanisika, zvinobatsira, uye kana basa racho riri mune repository revanhu.
Zvimwe zvikumbiro zvinogona kurambwa, kunonoka, kana kugadziridzwa zvisati zvatenderwa.

fields.name: anokumbira
fields.label: Zita renyu kana kuti sangano renyu

fields.name: nhareDetails
fields.label: Mashoko okutaura naye
fields.helper: E-mail kero kana Discord kubata nokuda kutevera-up.

fields.name: mamweMashoko akapoteredza
fields.label: Mamwe mashoko akapoteredza
fields.helper: Goverana chimwe chinhu chipi nechipi chinobetsera kutsanangura chinodikanwa chacho: chikonzero nei chichikosha, mienzaniso, nongedzero, pfungwa yepurogiramu yakashata, kana ganhuriro dzenguva.

fields.name: openSourceConsent (kubvumirana)
fields.label: Unonyatsogutsikana nokuita basa rokugadzira zvinhu zviri pachena here?
fields.helper: Zvirongwa zvinogamuchirwa ndezvemabhuku ehurumende pasi peIATF.

items: mainjiniya ane mutoro akapiwa basa racho
chibvumirano checopyleft chekodhi uye zvinhu zveprojekti

paragraphs: Kana une chinodikanwa chaicho chokuwanika uye uchifunga kuti chinofanira kuva chirongwa chevoruzhinji, titumire kwatiri.
